title: Glendale Criminal Defense Attorney - Farris Law Firm
metaDescription: Need a Glendale criminal defense lawyer? Farris Law provides strong, case-specific strategies to defend you against misdemeanor or felony charges.
contentHtml:
A Glendale criminal defense attorney from Farris Law can help you fight for your rights when facing misdemeanor or felony charges. We use case-specific strategies that challenge the evidence and provide an aggressive defense to help mitigate the severe consequences you could be facing.

Contact a Glendale criminal defense attorney from our firm online or at (818) 861-0861 to protect your future when facing criminal charges.

Glendale Criminal Defense Lawyer Guide

  • Why Choose a Criminal Defense Attorney From Farris Law?
  • Types of Cases We Handle
  • Common Defense Strategies in Southern California Criminal Cases
  • Farris Law Firm | We Got You When Criminal Charges Threaten Your Future

Why Choose a Criminal Defense Attorney From Farris Law?

We understand the stress and uncertainty of criminal charges, and our team of legal professionals is dedicated to providing compassionate legal support that helps you toward a favorable resolution.

Because we manage a caseload that doesn’t leave clients feeling rushed or unimportant, we have the time to understand the individual circumstances of each case and tailor our defense strategies accordingly.

Our long history advocating for clients in Glendale and southern California gives us an edge in navigating local laws and handling legal proceedings. This has helped many of our clients find a path towards justice that aligns with their goals and needs.

At Farris Law, you won’t have to wonder what is going on with your case or how our team is working to defend you. We keep clients informed and involved throughout the entire process, focusing on communication and education to ensure you understand the legal proceedings and your options at every phase.

Don’t let criminal charges jeopardize your future – contact Farris Law today to schedule a consultation and protect your rights.

Types of Cases We Handle

You don’t have to face criminal charges alone. A Glendale criminal defense lawyer from Farris Law Firm can provide support with a range of cases, including:

  • Shoplifting: A shoplifting charge might feel small, but the consequences can be significant. We’ll help you handle the legal process and move forward with confidence.
  • Break-ins: An accusation of breaking and entering can upend your life. We’ll work on strategies to protect your rights and your future.
  • Robbery: Robbery and theft charges come with serious penalties. We’ll explore every legal option, from reducing the charges to negotiating dismissals.
  • Burglary: Don’t leave a burglary charge unchecked. We’ll help you clarify what’s next and advise appropriate legal defenses for your situation.
  • Vandalism: Vandalism charges can lead to lasting consequences. We’ll guide you through defending your case and work hard to secure a favorable outcome in your case.
  • Expungement: Expungement and diversion programs can offer a fresh start for eligible individuals in California, providing opportunities to clear your record or avoid traditional prosecution. We can help you understand your options and the steps needed to pursue the best possible resolution.
  • DUI and DWI: DUI or DWI arrests don’t have to define you. We’ll act fast to address your charges and defend your future.
  • Drug and Gun Defense Cases: Drug or firearm charges are serious, but they don’t have to be your final story. We’ll help you fight for a clear path forward.
  • Civil Restraining Orders (for victims): No one should live in fear. If you’re dealing with harassment or threats, we’ll assist you in securing a restraining order that protects your safety and restores your peace.

Our Glendale criminal defense attorneys believe everyone deserves a fair shot at justice. Whether facing misdemeanor or felony charges, turn to our criminal defense law firm to provide strong and effective representation.

Common Defense Strategies in Southern California Criminal Cases

No two cases are alike. That’s why our Glendale criminal defense lawyers craft personalized strategies to lessen the impact of criminal charges. Legal defenses we have used in the past to help clients achieve a more favorable outcome in their case include:

  • Challenging Unlawful Searches and Seizures: If evidence was obtained without a proper warrant or probable cause, we work to exclude it from your case under California Penal Code §1538.5.
  • Questioning the Accuracy of DUI Tests: From breathalyzer calibration errors to improper testing procedures, every detail matters. We’ll scrutinize your DUI case to uncover issues that could lead to a reduction or dismissal.
  • Negotiating Charge Reductions: Are you facing charges with severe implications? We frequently fight to reduce charges, such as lowering a felony to a misdemeanor, minimizing potential penalties.
  • Pursuing Diversion Programs: Eligible non-violent offenders may be able to complete a diversion program instead of facing traditional prosecution. This could result in a dismissal upon successful completion.
  • Demonstrating Lack of Intent: Many criminal charges hinge on intent. We explore circumstances like mistaken identity or miscommunication to argue there was no criminal intent in your case.
  • Highlighting Mistaken Identity: Eyewitness accounts can be unreliable. If you were misidentified, we’ll present evidence to clear up the misunderstanding and protect your reputation.
  • Building a Strong Defense for DUI Cases: For professionals like nurses, lawyers, or truck drivers, a DUI conviction can put their licenses and careers at risk. We provide legal defense to address DUI charges and potentially minimize the impact it has on your career.
  • Attacking Weak Prosecution Evidence: A case based on circumstantial evidence or unreliable witnesses may crumble when challenged effectively. We investigate the evidence to identify flaws and gaps.
  • Arguing for Probation Instead of Jail Time: If a conviction seems unavoidable, we negotiate for probation and other alternatives to keep you out of custody and focused on getting your life back on track.
  • Fighting to Exclude Coerced Confessions: Coerced statements violate your rights. We examine interrogation details to ensure your statements were given voluntarily and without pressure.
  • Filing Motions for Case Dismissal: Some cases may be dismissed outright if procedural violations occurred, such as filing charges after the statute of limitations expired.

Each case deserves a tailored strategy. We focus on uncovering paths to lessen penalties or secure dismissals, helping you to potentially avoid significant consequences that affect your life, career, and freedoms.

Farris Law Firm | We Got You When Criminal Charges Threaten Your Future

Facing the possibility of jail time, heavy fines, and the loss of all you’ve worked hard to build in your life isn’t easy to handle on your own. A Glendale criminal defense lawyer from Farris Law Firm can be your ally when the stakes are too high to handle alone.

Our close-knit team of experienced attorneys is dedicated to providing aggressive and effective defense strategies for our clients in Southern California. We understand the importance of protecting your rights, preserving your freedoms, and securing a positive outcome for your case.

Lean on us when criminal charges threaten your future. Contact a Glendale criminal defense lawyer from Farris Law Firm online or at (818) 861-0861 to learn how we can help you today.
